name: KT Cloud
description: KT Cloud offers IaaS/PaaS (server, object storage, DBaaS, GPU) with Korean data residency and telco-grade network.

seo.title: KT Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: KT Cloud: KT Cloud offers IaaS/PaaS (server, object storage, DBaaS, GPU) with Korean data residency and telco-grade network.

when_to_use: Korean carrier-grade cloud IaaS with high-speed network
GPU cloud for AI training with Korean data residency
Object storage and managed databases for Korean enterprises
Korean telecom-backed cloud for low-latency domestic apps
DBaaS with Korean SLA and support for regulated industries

review.verdict: Reasonable Korean cloud for local enterprises and GPU workloads, not a global player.
review.best_for: Korean enterprises needing local data residency or domestic GPU compute
review.not_for: Global products, startups, or anyone outside Korea
